name: 高斯定律
subject: physics
curriculum_points:
1.5.A.1
Motion in two or three dimensions can be analyzed using one-dimensional kinematic relationships if the motion is separated into components.

1.5.A.2
Velocity and acceleration may be different in each dimension and may be nonuniform.

1.5.A.4
Projectile motion is a special case of two-dimensional motion that has zero acceleration in one dimension and constant, nonzero acceleration in the second dimension.
